title: Decision Process for Hypothesis Testing Using Significance Levels
description: A flowchart illustrating the steps for making a statistical decision based on comparing a p-value to a pre-determined significance level (α).
relationships: Flow from Start to Choose α
Flow from Choose α to Calculate
Flow from Calculate to p-value ≤ α? decision point
Yes branch from decision to Reject H₀
No branch from decision to Fail to Reject H₀
Flow from both outcomes to Conclusion
